segments.text: 你不知道的趣味新鲜是
Today is Mother Goose Day in the USA
今天是美国的额妈妈节
Blossom 是一隻住在池塘裡的鵝
Animals don't have wives or husbands, they have mates
Geese have the same mate all their lives
Blossom's mate was Bud, but Bud died last year
動物沒有所謂的老婆或老公,動物的夫妻叫做配偶
而医生只会有一个配偶,Blossom的配偶Bud去年过世了。
唯一,Blossom常常去附近一間辦公室的門口,看著窗戶反射的自己,沒有Bud,Blossom好難過,又好寂寞。
She saw Blossom at the windows.
She sent a letter to a newspaper.
The letter said Blossom wanted a new mate.
在办公室工作的Dory看到了Blossom,然后寄了一封信给报社,说Blossom想要一个新配偶。
Two people read about Blossom in the newspaper.
They had a pet named Frankie.
Frankie was lonely, his mate was dead, and he was a goose.
有两个人在报纸上读到Blossom的故事,他们有一只叫做Frankie的鹅,他的配偶也过世了。
Now, Blossom and Frankie are mates, they go to the pond together.
现在Blossom跟Frankie变成配偶了,他们会一起去池塘划水。
Happy Mother Goose Day Blossom and Frankie
鵝講而失去終身伴侶是很大的打擊
這個故事裡的鵝找到了第二圈
Why does your dog look so sad?
你的狗怎麼看起來這麼悲傷?
对啊 他好难过 又很寂寞
She got hit by a truck
No dog should die that way
But trucks and cars drive very fast here
我知道 但是這裡的卡車 汽車 都開很快
Now Buddy just sits there and looks at the door
現在 Buddy就坐在那裡 看著門
He's waiting for his mate to come back
他在等他的伴侶回來嗎
今天的單字 你可記住了
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.
你不知道的趣味新鮮室
My favorite food is tuna sushi
Fishermen catch the tuna we eat
他們每年捕捉7億公斤的鮪魚
漁民每一年不撈70億公斤的鮪魚
鮪魚的數量每年都變小
What happens when the number is too small?
The number of fish cannot get big again.
Restaurants and supermarkets won't have much tuna.
Then one day, there will be no tuna fish.
鮪魚的數量每一年都在減少。
假如太少,鮪魚將沒有辦法再恢復到從前。
未來世界上就沒有鮪魚了。
A new company wants to help tuna fish, how does it help?
It doesn't use fish, it is plant-based tuna.
有一家公司,想要幫助鮪魚,他們決定製作鮪魚肉,他們用豌豆,藻類,還有其他植物來製造樹的鮪魚肉。
Maybe many of us can eat plant-based tuna, then we can stop eating tuna fish.
The number of tuna fish can get big again.
Do you want to try this plant-based tuna?
You can help save tuna fish too.
鮪魚過度捕撈,有可能再也無法恢復。
Are you eating potato chips again?
Just a couple of pieces, 只吃兩片。
You know better than that, 你應該知道不該吃的。
Well, I don't like healthy snacks, 我就不愛健康零食。
很多健康食物很好吃的
I don't see any pineapple here
The supermarket is right next door
现在下雨,我明天去试试看。
OK,can I have some of your chips?
好吧,我可以吃一点你的洋芋片吗?
What happens when the number of tuna fish gets too small?
What kind of tuna does the new company make?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.
ICRT與教育部國民集學前教育署
選英文 吸收新知識
讓你隨選 隨聽 還有文字稿喔
This has been News for Kids on ICRT
brought to you by the K-12 Education Administration.
Tune in for more every weekday
and check out past episodes on the ICRT website and app.
你不知道的趣味新鮮室
I want to be with my dog all day
But I can't take him everywhere
Is he okay at home all day?
He can't go for a walk.
Does he want to play with other dogs?
我不能每天都把狗狗帶在身邊。
他會想跟其他狗狗玩嗎?
很多人太忙,没有空遛狗。
The dogs sit on their own seats.
Are the dogs good in the bus?
I think all the dogs are good.
It's because good dogs get dog treats.
Mo 還有一台狗狗專用的巴士
他們上車坐好 還要繫安全帶
表現好的狗狗 有領嘴可以吃
所以他們在車上都很乖
The bus goes to a walking trail.
The dogs get off the bus.
Mo takes them on a long walk.
巴士会把狗狗送到步道。
Mo就带着他们走好长一段路。
They aren't at home all day.
Maybe I can be a dog walker too.
Then I can play with dogs all day.
這名專業遛狗人要照顧的狗太多,需要一輛小巴士來裝載。
I need to pick up my dog.
Just like picking up a child.
Yeah, only a child would wear a seat belt 對,但是小孩會扣上安全帶
But not your dog 你的狗不用嗎?
No, he likes to play with a ball in the back seat 不用,他喜歡在後座玩球
Just take away the ball 把球拿走啊
I can't, he'll be bored and bark at me all the way home 不行
她會覺得無聊,回家路上對著我叫
Maybe you should just walk him home
也許你應該就跟他走路回家
What do the dogs do on the bus?
Why do the dogs go to the trail?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app

This has been News for Kids on ICRT
Bought to you by the K-12 Education Administration
Tune in for more every weekday
And check out past episodes on the ICRT website and app
是時候給孩子的消息了!
你不知道的趣味新鮮是
我放在所有我吃的東西上
我好愛番茄醬,我會把它放在熱狗或是漢堡上,有時候還會配白飯吃。
I love ketchup very much, but I don't eat only ketchup, I need some food to eat it with.
Ketchup on french fries, on pizza, on...
但是,我不会光吃番茄酱,得要跟其他东西一起吃,像是薯条、披萨等等。
But did you hear the news?
A man ate only ketchup for many days.
但是,有一个人光吃番茄酱吃了好多天。
This man was working on a boat.
The boat went out to sea.
He found a bottle of ketchup.
他到处找食物,只找到一瓶番茄酱。
He was lost at sea for 24 days, he had ketchup to eat, he had some dirty water to drink, he had no other food.
He made soup with ketchup and water, he ate it every day.
他在海上漂流了24天,只有番茄酱可以吃。
另外,還有一點骯髒的水,他用番茄醬跟水做成湯,每天都喝。
One day, he had no more ketchup, but a ship found him that day.
番茄醬用完的那天,剛好有一艘船找到他了,正是好險!
I love ketchup, but can I eat it for 24 days?
靠著番茄醬 這名男子撿回一條命
I'm so hungry 我餓死了
Did you eat everything in the fridge again?
你又把冰箱裡的東西都吃了
There's some leftover pizza from yesterday.
沒有 還有昨天剩下的披薩
I guess that will have to work.
Can you make me a sandwich too?
你也可以帮我做个三明治吗?
当然,我来帮你做一个soup,汤。
Since I'm already on it, let me make a soup too.
既然我已经在做,来煮个汤好了。
你看起来好几天没吃饭了
What did he have to eat?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.
和ICRT與教育部國民集學前教育署

Tune in for more every weekday
and check out past episodes on the ICRT website and app.
是時候給孩子的消息了!
你不知道的趣味新鮮是
抱歉,我剛剛接到一個電話
說到電話,讓我告訴你世界上第一個用
Drones are small machines that fly.
A man called Casey lives in Oregon.
It snows there in the winter.
One day, he drove his car into the mountains.
There was so much snow, his car couldn't move.
Casey住在奧勒岡州,那裡冬天會下雪。
有一天,他在山上開車的時候,被積雪困住了。
Casey tried to use his cell phone.
He wanted to send a text message.
But his cell phone wouldn't work.
Casey想要用手機傳簡訊,但是發不出去。
This means he has a camera drone in his car.
He tied his cell phone to the drone.
他的车上有一台空拍机,他把手机绑在空拍机上。
他的空拍机飞上天空,发出了简讯。
不久后,就有人来帮忙了。
手機簡訊被積雪擋住發不出去
把手機送上天就解決了這個問題
No, I don't think I got any messages from you
沒有,我好像沒收到你的簡訊
But I sent it to you last night
It should be in your cell phone
我的手机有一段时间没电
不管怎样,你想跟我讲什么
It's time for news for kids, news for kids
你不知道的趣味新鮮室
Oh, that's the sound of a fire truck
It can be a fire or a car crash.
消防隊員會幫助有緊急狀況的人。
It wasn't because of a fire.
One boy had a cell phone
Hello, this is the fire department.
Okay, don't worry boys, we're on our way.
但是他們都不知道自己在哪裡
Then they went down into the sewer.
They did not see the boys.
飛快遞趕到下水道之後
消防隊員找到了這些小男孩
而且很幸運的是下水道裡面
在下水道裡面迷路的五個小男孩靠著手機通訊獲救
Hey, didn't we pass this store just 10 minutes ago?
我们不是十分钟前才经过这家店。
没错,现在我确定我们迷路了。
Let me call the emergency number.
But this is not an emergency
可是我們現在並不緊急
我們就從那裡走下去吧
What is the emergency phone number in Taiwan?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app
以上是ICRT K-12教育部署的新闻
以及在ICRT网站和互联网站上查看上述过去的节目
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
We can do many things with cell phones
手机可以帮我们打电话,传简讯,还有拍照。
时尚第一台手机,有1公斤重,超级大,又超级重,而且只能讲25分钟的电话。
他在1973年发明了世界上第一支手机,所以
他在1973年发明了世界上第一支手机,所以又被叫做手机致富。
當時他製造的手機要賣五千美元左右,超過十五萬台幣。
Couper今年已经94岁了,他有一支新的手机,他很开心大家都在用手机,但他觉得大家用太久了。
Some people eat dinner and look at their cell phones, they cross the street and look at their cell phones.
That isn't good, a car can hit them.
有一些人,連吃飯跟過馬路的時候,都在看手機,這樣很危險。
Do people look at their cell phones too much?
手機已經有很多年的歷史,現代手機跟以前的大不一樣。
Come see my brand new bike,你來看我全新的腳踏車。
How much did you pay for it?
That's a lot of money for a bike!
I know, but I'll make the most out of it 我知道,不过我会尽量多用
I'll take it anywhere I go 我不管去哪里都会骑
But it's super easy to ride
I'm thinking of riding it up 阳明山
I'll go with you in my car
People look at them too much
on the ICRT website and app
也请在ICRT网站和应用软件上检查
你不知道的趣味新鲜事
How about some cold milk tea?
Drinks are great on a hot day.
你们喜欢喝什么饮料呢?
Many drink shops use plastic cups
People use these plastic cups just once
Then they throw the cups away
Plastic is very bad for the earth
Lots of plastic gets into the ocean
很多飲料店都用塑膠杯
流進海裡也會傷害到海洋動物
That's why New Taipei City has a new rule
Drink shops can't sell drinks in plastic cups
There are 2,700 drink shops in New Taipei City
368億盒子的塑膠杯不會每年使用。
所以,新北市政府規定,從5月1日開始,飲料店禁止用塑膠杯。
新北市有2700間飲料店,將每一年會少用3億6千多萬個塑膠杯。
新台北市是台湾第二个城市要有这个规则
是的,台北第一个城市要禁止购物在纸盒上
新北市是第二个推行这个规定的城市
新台北市和台北市现在用什么酒店?
現在新北跟台北的飲料店都用紙杯,紙杯對環境的危害比較少。
為了環保,許多飲料店都已經停用塑膠杯。
Water tastes better than most soft drinks.
First, some tea drinks have too much sugar.
Second, it now costs some 50 NT a cup, 第二,現在一杯茶要50塊。
Cup, 杯子, that's not a lot, 那沒多少。
No, but you will save one cup, 對,但你省下一個杯子。
That's just one in a billion, 那只是十億個裡面的一個。
You're hopeless, Jane, 你沒救了。
News for kids, news for kids
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Hey everyone, look at the people around you
Some people think big bellies aren't healthy,
but some think big bellies are great.
我们身边的人高、矮、胖、瘦都有。
有一些人觉得大肚子不健康,但有一些人就欣赏大肚子。
The Bodhi people live in Ethiopia.
Ethiopia is a country in Africa.
The Bodhi people like men with big bellies.
他們每年都會舉辦一個大肚子比賽
最大肚子的男人會勝出
波迪人住在非洲的伊索比亞
他們喜歡大肚子的男生
They drink a lot of milk and cow blood.
The men want to have the biggest belly very much.
要有大肚子,其实不简单。
每天要吃蜂蜜,喝牛奶跟牛血。
他們展示他們的大肚子
這意味著所有人都覺得贏者很棒
但是會得到大家的尊重
Next year, they'll try to get the biggest belly again.
比賽後呢,他們會開始減肥,直到隔年再次養大肚子。
Big or small, you are great.
Let's celebrate Eat What You Want Day today.
伊索皮亞這項比賽是選出肚子最大的男士認為這是榮譽。
I really need to exercise during summer vacation.
我真的得在暑假時運動
It's still one month away 還有一個月呢?
Month 月份 Summer vacation is two months long 暑假有兩個月
I know that 我知道啊
So I can try to walk two hours every morning 所以我可以試著每天早上走兩個鐘頭
You can walk 20 minutes every day now.
你可以现在每天走20分钟。
I need to walk off my belly fat.
我需要走路甩腹部脂肪。
And I have loads of it.
你有没有每天运动的习惯?
What do the Bodhi people think of the winner?
以上是ICRT K-12教育部署的新闻
以及上述ICRT的网站和应用程式
你不知道的趣味新鮮事
I'm eating lunch at the beach
that sea bird took my lunch
现在,科学家想知道海鸟有多聪明,保护海鸟的安全。
海鸟偷走了我的午餐,它们好聪明,科学家想要知道海鸟到底有多聪明,好保护它们。
科学家想保护海鸟安全,从风物辙子。
风物辙子从风中生产电力,它们有大型机器,被称为汽车。
The wind spins the blades around and around.
There's lots of wind at sea.
Turbines make the most electricity there.
So, companies put wind farms there.
海邊風很強,所以風力發電渦輪機都蓋在海邊。
上面有三片葉片,風會吹動散熱來發電。
海鳥會飛進發電機轉動的扇葉而死亡,
於是開始研究鳳立發電廠的海鳥安全。
科學家擔心海鳥會飛進發電機轉動的扇葉而死亡,
於是開始研究鳳立發電廠的海鳥安全。
他們觀看了10,000個發電機的影片。
They saw four kinds of seabirds come and go, and they found nothing.
Zero seabirds flew into the turbine blades.
They all flew far away from the spinning blades.
Scientists don't know why, but those seabirds are very smart indeed.
科学家研究了两年,看了一万多只发电机的监视器影片。
發現有四種海鳥來來去去
但是這些海鳥就是很聰明
科學家也不知道為什麼
Scientists need to study other kinds of seabirds, maybe now they will find how to save thousands of other seabirds too.
海鸟跟锋利发电渦轮机相安无事,让科学家有些意外。
Yeah, it's beautiful against the blue sky.
It'll steady once the wind weakens.
Now it's flying too far away.
It'll take an hour to bring it back, 要一个钟头才收得回来。
That's okay, we have a lot of time.
没关系,我们有的是时间。
This is a really nice beach.
We should come back more often.
你有在海边放风筝过吗?
How many seabirds flew into the machines?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.

你不知道的趣味新鮮是
I think it's a golden retriever
That dog is a guide dog.
那裡有一隻好漂亮的狗狗。
我想是黃金獵犬,正希望摸摸牠說Hello。
但是不行,因為牠是導盲犬。
Their job is to help blind people or anyone who cannot see very well.
导盲权有工作要做,负责保护市长人士的安全
台湾的人行道人很多,还有借梯、招牌跟机车
想像你是个盲人,在忙碌的人行道上,会容易受伤。
A blind person can be safe with a guide dog.
A guide dog will stop them from getting hurt.
In Taiwan, 60,000 people are blind or cannot see very well.
But, there are only 42 working guide dogs in this country.
Most other countries have more guide dogs.
全台湾大约有6万名视障人士,但是只有42只导盲犬,比其他的国家都少。
It is not easy to get a guide dog.
A dog needs training for 2-3 years.
There are not many trainers in Taiwan.
一只狗狗要经过两三年的训练,才可以成为导盲犬,而且国内的训练师不多。
一只导盲犬的训练费用可能要花3万2千台币。
台湾需要更多导盲犬,所以来吧,让我们练习这些导盲犬!
導盲犬對於視障人士有極大的幫助,卻不容易得到。
you're a nice dog, aren't you?
Train, 訓練 Yeah, she's well trained.
Did you send her to a dog school?
No, a dog trainer helped me out.
不是,有一位狗訓練師來幫我忙
Safe, 安全的 Tracy keeps me safe on the sidewalk.
Tracy會在人行道上保護我的安全
Wow, how does she do that?
She stops bikers from hitting me
What kind of dog has long gold hair?
Who do guide dogs keep safe?
How many people in Taiwan are blind or can't see very well?
on the ICRT website and app
選英文 吸收新知識
讓你隨選 隨聽 還有文字稿喔
你不知道的趣味新鮮是…
我等不及去騎我的腳踏車
我有了一辆新的脚踏车,我等不及要去骑骑看了!
Taiwan has many beautiful cycle routes.
They let you see mountains and forests and the ocean.
They have made Taiwan famous all over the world for cycling.
Route 是路线的意思,你也可以念作 route.
Taiwan 有很多美丽的自行车道,可以看到高山、森林或是大海。
这让台湾的自行车旅游世界闻名
新北市有很多河边的自行车道,但是骑车是有风险的。
有人骑太快而撞车受伤。
而且,很多自行车道距离马路很远,救护车很难到达。
新台北市有个好点子,他们组织了特别的自行车队伍来帮助人。
这些自行车有第一手车的车架,
车架有所有需要帮助伤者的东西。
The team rides up and down the cycle routes.
The cyclists look for people who need help.
They can get to people faster than an ambulance.
這個隊伍的自行車上有急救箱
這樣不只可以比救護車快
腳踏車急救隊可以及時幫助受傷的人
Let's go for a bike ride today
On a rainy day like this, are you sure?
For a good cyclist like you, it shouldn't be a problem
對你這樣很會騎的人應該不是問題
I am good at biking, but I don't like getting injured.
我確實很行,但是我不喜歡受傷。
Let's just ride in the Jingmei Riverside Park.
我們就只在Jingmei河濱公園騎好了。

他特別為馬雀做鳥巢,放在城市每一個角落。

他一個人做了二十五萬個鳥巢,他還拜訪過三千五百間學校,教學生怎麼做鳥巢,已經有十萬個學生學會了這個技巧。
Today is a day for helping animals.

對,通常在夏天或是秋天就走了

我想是去比台北凉快的地方。
